articles.title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
articles.summary: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

articles.title: Our principles
articles.summary: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.

articles.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
articles.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

articles.title: Working with Codex
articles.summary: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.

articles.title: Plugins and skills
articles.summary: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.
